description_long: This is a beaded necklace displayed on a white mannequin bust. The necklace features a combination of light blue round beads and multicolored patterned beads, with a prominent curved metallic centerpiece at the front. The metallic centerpiece appears to be gold-toned and is flanked by decorative bead clusters. The beads are strung in a symmetrical arrangement, with the blue beads forming the majority of the strand and the patterned beads adding visual interest. The necklace is designed to sit closely around the neck, suggesting a choker or collar style. The overall design is eclectic, blending modern and traditional elements with a focus on color contrast and a central metallic accent.
description: A beaded necklace with light blue and multicolored beads, featuring a gold-toned curved centerpiece, displayed on a white bust. The design is eclectic and visually striking with a mix of bead shapes and colors.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the light blue beads encircling the neck, with the necklace's clasp area not visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the necklace, showing the transition from blue to patterned beads.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the full arrangement of beads and the prominent gold-toned curved centerpiece.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the side profile and bead arrangement.
